race.description: 1Equine - For The Equine Athlete Mdn Plate
race.comment: CAPTIVATE LEGEND (5) finished fourth over 1350m at Ipswich when resuming last start, beaten only 1.2 lengths after being in contention on the turn. Strips fitter and can bounce back. SOMETHING SHINY (2) went forward and gave a great sight before finishing second when resuming last time out over 1300m at this track. Drawn to enjoy a nice run just off the speed. Well placed and there is no reason why he cannot salute. RUN TO YOU (10) was doing her best work late last start to get up for third over 1200m here. Another bold showing is expected. MARKHAM MISS (6) was much better last time and is open to further improvement.
